findings.summary: RepositoryRecoveryCoordinator is implemented and tested but never instantiated or called in production code.
findings.suggested_fix: Instantiate RepositoryRecoveryCoordinator in the worker drain/scheduler loops and call its execute() method to actively run the recovery policy.

findings.summary: recoverableRunIds is computed in worker-drain-loop.ts and worker-scheduler.ts, passed to WorkerLoopDeps, but never actually used in worker-loop.ts.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the recoverableRunIds property from WorkerLoopDeps and its computation from the loops, as it is obsolete dead code.
